result.stdout:
Description:
  C# syntax to mermaid.js diagram

Usage:
  cs2mmd [options]

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                         output file(default stdout)
  -i, --input <input>                           input file(default stdin)
  -ie, --input-encoding <input-encoding>        input text encoding(default UTF8)
  -oe, --output-encoding <output-encoding>      output text encoding(default UTF8 no BOM)
  --md-with-source                              output markdown format with source
  --lang-version <lang-version>                 C# language version
  --available-version                           output available C# version and exit
  --pp-symbol <pp-symbol>                       preprocessor symbol(can be multiple)
  -co, --chart-orientation <chart-orientation>  flowchart orientation(default: LR)
  --as-script                                   parse as C# script
  --output-diagnostics                          output diagnostics to stderr
  --version                                     Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                Show help and usage information
